relationships: ber:Ur tezmir ara ad tili tla nnig simraw n yiseggasen
ber:Yal taddart deg Tmurt n Yizwawen tla tamesgida
ber:Sandra d tameṭṭut yernu tla kumraw sin n yiseggasen
ber:Yal taddart deg Tmurt n Leqbayel tla tamesgida
ber:Lezzayer Tamaneɣt tla aṭas n tmesgidiwin
ber:Tella d tilemẓit yeččuṛen d tudert, acebbub-nnes d aras yernu tla simraw-sḍis n yiseggasen deg leɛmeṛ-nnes
ber:Tamurt n Yizwawen, deg Dzayer, tla imerdulen d ihuskayen
